title: Sātkhira Heavy Rain
lead: Sātkhira experiences abnormal heavy rain with a Z-Score of +3.29. This event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The heavy rain in Sātkhira is caused by intense atmospheric conditions, leading to a high humidity of 91% and moderate winds of 16.3 km/h. 
 The significant amount of rain has resulted in a Cooling Degree Day (CDD) of 10.5 GG, indicating a substantial cooling effect. 
 The heavy rain has also led to a Heating Degree Day (HDD) of 0.0 GG, showing no heating requirement.
conclusion: Operational teams should be on high alert to mitigate the effects of this critical weather event.
